title: Petface (Toyz by Petface) Triple Tug Ring Dog Toy, Small
features: INTERACTIVE PLAY: Keep your furry friend entertained for hours with this tough and durable toy that stimulates dental health
SHAPES & TEXTURES: The Petface Triple Tug Ring features various shapes and textures to engage in satisfying chewing activities
PET HEALTH: Designed to promote healthy teeth and gums while providing mental stimulation for your pet’s overall well-being
TOUGH & DURABLE: Made from high-quality materials, this toy is built to withstand intense play sessions and keep up with your dog’s energy level

TOY SAFETY: This toy is strong but not indestructible, and will eventually become susceptible to ‘chew’ damage, please supervise your pet with this toy, examine regularly for wear, and replace if any damage could be seen a health hazard
description: From the manufacturer Petface - your pets best friend - whether it's collars, leads, feeding, bedding or toys our product experts design with your pet in mind! The Petface range is of the highest quality and provides fun, innovative and interactive products to keep your pets fit, healthy and enjoying life! Shop for your favourite dog, cats and wild bird for great, affordable products! Petface Toyz Triple Ring Tugger Dog Toy This fun rope Triple Ring Tugger from the Petface Toyz range is brightly-coloured and perfect for outdoor use. This brightly coloured toy is made from made of non-toxic synthetic durable rubber and strong rope. With a loop for your hand at either end, this tugger is perfect for interactive fun with your dog. ABOUT PETFACE All your needs are covered with the Petface range, including collars, leads, toys, feeding, coats and bedding. The designers at Petface have ensured the range has a co-ordinated look and style making sure your pets will be the ‘best dressed in town’. TREAT YOUR PAMPERED POOCH! Treat your pampered pooch to this triple ring toy, perfect for tugging games. This fun toy helps to develop your pet's sense of play and exercise, helping them to stay fit and healthy. YOUR DOG'S BEST FRIEND! Ideal for interactive play indoors or outdoors, the Toyz Triple Ring Tugger Dog Toy is great for throw and fetch or for keeping your dog amused when left to their own devices.
